name: Lamball
description: A fluffy pal that loves to roll around. Its wool is surprisingly soft and warm.

name: Cattiva
description: A mischievous cat-like pal with nimble paws. Great at carrying supplies.

name: Chikipi
description: A small bird pal commonly found near settlements. Easy to befriend.

name: Lifmunk
description: A tiny squirrel pal that shoots seeds with precision. Found in lush forests.

name: Foxparks
description: A fiery fox pal with a flame-tipped tail. Provides warmth at camp.

name: Sparkit
description: A small electric pal that crackles with static energy. Powers generators.

name: Pengullet
description: A penguin pal that waddles adorably. Can launch water projectiles.

name: Fuack
description: A duck-like pal that controls water currents. Often found near rivers.

name: Tanzee
description: A monkey pal that swings through trees with ease. Very agile in combat.

name: Beegarde
description: A bee pal that guards its hive fiercely. Produces honey at the ranch.

name: Rooby
description: A kangaroo pal with fiery fists. Its punches can melt stone.

name: Verdash
description: A swift grass-type pal that dashes through meadows at incredible speed.

name: Daedream
description: A shadowy pal that lurks in darkness. Attacks enemies while you sleep.

name: Arsox
description: A mighty bull pal wreathed in flames. Can be ridden across lava fields.

name: Vanwyrm
description: A winged fire pal that soars through volcanic skies. A fierce aerial mount.

name: Penking
description: The emperor of penguin pals. Commands ice and water with royal authority.

name: Mossanda
description: A gorilla pal covered in moss. Its strength is matched only by its gentleness.

name: Ragnahawk
description: A legendary hawk engulfed in eternal flame. Rules the skies.

name: Jormuntide
description: A massive sea dragon pal. Ancient legends speak of its power over tides.

name: Relaxaurus
description: A lazy dinosaur pal with devastating firepower. Don't let its calm fool you.

name: Grizzbolt
description: A massive electric bear pal. Its thunder clap can be heard for miles.

name: Frostallion
description: A majestic ice horse pal. The legendary mount of the frozen tundra.

name: Anubis
description: An ancient guardian pal with immense power. Master of earth and sand.

name: Suzaku
description: A mythical phoenix pal reborn from flames. One of the four divine pals.

name: Jetragon
description: The ultimate dragon pal. Flies at supersonic speeds with devastating power.
